name: kleinguard
description: AI-powered parametric income protection for gig workers

scripts.setup: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && pip install -r ml/requirements.txt && node db.js seed && cd ml && python train_model.py
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "SERVER,CLIENT,ML" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:ml"
